sections.paragraph:
Original: קשׁח

Transliteration: qâshach

Phonetic: kaw-shakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to make hard, treat hardly, treat severely
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to make hard, make stubborn
      2. to treat hardly, treat roughly

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2087

Part(s) of speech: Verb
